briefdescription.para: Create layout metrics with default limits, preferred size, and size policy.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Size minimum, const Size maximum, const Size preferred, const SizePolicy policy, const Margins margins={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: LayoutMetrics

parameterdescription.para: The recommended outer margins. Negative values are clamped to zero.

briefdescription.para: Set the size policy for both dimensions.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Fix the height to a single value.
Fix the width to a single value.
Fix both dimensions to a single size.

detaileddescription.para: Margins are always zero or positive and are not part of the layout sizes.
Negative sides are clamped to zero.

briefdescription.para: Resolve a concrete size for this metrics object against a proposal.
The measured and configured layout metrics of a surface.

detaileddescription.para: The minimum, maximum, and preferred sizes describe the surface content rectangle, excluding margins. Margins are non-negative recommendations for parent-owned outer spacing. Parent layouts decide whether and how to apply or propagate them.
